original_text: karmany evadhikaras te ma phalesu kadacana
transliteration: karmany evadhikaras te ma phalesu kadacana
translation: You have a claim on action alone, never on the fruits of action.
commentary_summary: A core teaching on doing what is right without fastening identity to outcomes.
source_edition: Curated app adaptation from public-domain translations

transliteration: yogasthah kuru karmani sangam tyaktva dhananjaya siddhy-asiddhyoh samo bhutva samatvam yoga ucyate
translation: Established in yoga, perform action with attachment abandoned, remaining even in success and failure. This evenness is called yoga.
commentary_summary: Frames balance, not passivity, as the right inner condition for difficult action.
source_edition: Curated app adaptation from public-domain translations

translation: Let a person lift the self by the self and not let the self sink down.
commentary_summary: Calls for disciplined self-responsibility without self-hatred.
source_edition: Curated app adaptation from public-domain translations

original_text: yato yato niscalati manas cancalam asthiram
transliteration: yato yato niscalati manas cancalam asthiram tatas tato niyamyaitad atmany eva vasam nayet
translation: Whenever the restless, unsteady mind wanders away, bring it back and place it again under the guidance of the self.
commentary_summary: Treats mental steadiness as a repeated practice of return, not a one-time victory.
source_edition: Curated app adaptation from public-domain translations

section_title: The qualities of a devoted person
original_text: adveshta sarva-bhutanam maitrah karuna eva ca
transliteration: adveshta sarva-bhutanam maitrah karuna eva ca nirmamo nirahankarah sama-duhkha-sukhah ksami
translation: One who has no hatred toward any being, who is friendly and compassionate, free from possessiveness and ego, steady in pain and pleasure, and patient, is dear.
commentary_summary: Links devotion with character, restraint, and tenderness rather than emotional intensity alone.
source_edition: Curated app adaptation from public-domain translations
